test-method.name: testSuccessfulPurchaseWorkflow
test-method.description: Verify user can login, add a specific product, and validate its data integrity at checkout

test-method.name: testLockedOutUserWorkflow
test-method.description: Verify appropriate error message is displayed for locked out users

test-method.name: testAllProductsDynamicStructure
test-method.description: Loop through all products and validate their details page structure

test-method.name: testAllUserProfilesMatrix
test-method.description: Execute E2E Checkout for all valid user profiles dynamic matrix

test-method.name: testAllUserProfilesMatrix
test-method.description: Execute E2E Checkout for all valid user profiles dynamic matrix

param.value: Epic sadface: Sorry, this user has been locked out.

test-method.name: testAllUserProfilesMatrix
test-method.description: Execute E2E Checkout for all valid user profiles dynamic matrix

exception.message: Financial Data Error for user: visual_user expected [$9.39] but found [$29.99]
